# Qt headless shims — intentional no-ops when Qt is unavailable
cutiepy.py:__init__
cutiepy.py:connect
cutiepy.py:emit
cutiepy.py:start
cutiepy.py:stop
cutiepy.py:instance
cutiepy.py:activewindow
cutiepy.headless.py:__init__
cutiepy.headless.py:connect
cutiepy.headless.py:emit
cutiepy.headless.py:start
cutiepy.headless.py:stop
cutiepy.headless.py:instance
cutiepy.headless.py:activewindow
cutiepy.headless.py:setwidgetresizable
cutiepy.headless.py:sethorizontalscrollbarpolicy
cutiepy.headless.py:setverticalscrollbarpolicy

# Lifecycle Qt shims
_lifecycle.py:__init__
_lifecycle.py:connect
_lifecycle.py:emit
_lifecycle.py:start
_lifecycle.py:stop
_lifecycle.py:eventhandler
_lifecycle.py:shouldsuppressmodalsound
_lifecycle.py:activechatview
_lifecycle.py:_returnnone
_lifecycle.py:play
_lifecycle.py:clearcache
_lifecycle.py:isrecording
_lifecycle.py:getactive
_lifecycle.py:availablesoundfiles
_lifecycle.py:ensure
_lifecycle.py:createtables
_lifecycle.py:bootstrap
_lifecycle.py:ensureschema
_lifecycle.py:__bool__

# Localization fallbacks — real implementations live in cutiepy.py
_localization.py:webengineAvailable
_localization.py:disablewebengine
_localization.py:applymanageddisplaybackground
_localization.py:stripembeddedlocalizationpayloads

# Theme fallbacks — CSS generation is optional
_themes.py:generatecss
_themes.py:storedHTMLwidget
_themes.py:getsvgmarkup
_themes.py:panelimagekey
